_comment: Excerpt from data/filings/providence-worcester/pages.json. One page; full file has the entire filing.

paragraphs.text: On July 12, 2016, Party C submitted an IOI with an offer price per share of $21.00, all-cash. The IOI was non-binding and subject to additional due diligence, including site visits.
Following receipt of the IOIs, the Transaction Committee discussed each indication and instructed GHF to follow up with each of the bidders to clarify open items, including financing and timing.
